case_title: DELONZO DWIGHT NISBY VS. ADRIAN HOTEL INC.

docket_entries.description: REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: SMALL CLAIMS CONTINUE ORDER MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 11/30/18. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - NO SUCH NUMBER - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 02/04/19. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED - UNABLE TO FORWARD."

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF NISBY, DELONZO DWIGHT ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-28-2018 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO FEB-01-2019 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAY-01-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY NISBY, DELONZO DWIGHT AS TO DEFENDANT ADRIAN HOTEL INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-28-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL GRANTED FILED BY DEFENDANT ADRIAN HOTEL INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NISBY, DELONZO DWIGHT IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ADRIAN HOTEL INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-01-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-01-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF IS PRESENT DELONZO DWIGHT NISBY. DEFENDANT ADRIAN HOTEL IS PRESENT REPRESENTED KUNAL PATEL, EMPLOYEE. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-01-2019 - JUDGMENT.
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT ADRIAN HOTEL INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED NOV-14-2018, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ADRIAN HOTEL INC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY DEFENDANT ADRIAN HOTEL INC.
